keywords.title: Search Keywords
keywords.description: List of job keywords to search for (e.g. 'software engineer', 'data analyst').

websites.title: Target Websites
websites.description: Select which job boards to scrape. You can also add custom website URLs.

maxResultsPerSitePerKeyword.title: Max Results Per Site Per Keyword
maxResultsPerSitePerKeyword.description: Maximum number of job listings to collect per website per keyword. Set 0 for unlimited.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Apify Proxy settings. Residential proxies recommended for LinkedIn and Indeed.

delayBetweenRequestsMs.title: Delay Between Requests (ms)
delayBetweenRequestsMs.description: Milliseconds to wait between requests to avoid rate limiting. Minimum 1000ms recommended.

respectRobotsTxt.title: Respect robots.txt
respectRobotsTxt.description: If enabled, the actor will skip paths disallowed by robots.txt. Disable only if you have explicit permission from the site owner.

languages.title: Language Filter
languages.description: Language variants to search on multilingual sites (e.g. 'de', 'en', 'fr').
